items.title: UMAP: Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection for Dimension Reduction
items.author: Leland McInnes, John Healy, James Melville
items.note: Original 2018 paper defining fuzzy topological construction and embedding optimization.

items.title: umap-learn documentation
items.author: Leland McInnes et al.
items.note: API reference for n_neighbors, min_dist, metric, n_components, and reproducibility options.

items.title: How UMAP Works (McInnes)
items.author: Google PAIR (explainer based on McInnes's work)
items.note: Intuitive walkthrough of fuzzy simplicial sets and the local/global balance—good companion to this topic.

items.title: scikit-learn manifold module overview
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Context for manifold learning methods alongside PCA and t-SNE comparisons.
